args:
set -eu
out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan)
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -Eq '^plan [0-9a-f]{64}$'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q '^engine vllm$'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q '^model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct@main$'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q '^backend FlashInfer$'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q '^regions '
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q '^request contract:'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q 'requested selectors:'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q 'expanded closure:'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q 'estimated work:'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q 'optimization:'
printf '%s' "$out" | grep -q 'pulled in by closure:'
printf 'plan-pass\n'
